_meta.description: Quiz for file merging FLIP-306 lesson

questions.question: Какую проблему решает FLIP-306 File Merging?

options.text: Small files problem в DFS (S3) для большие installations. На 2000 subtasks × 10 files/checkpoint × 2880 checkpoints/day = 57M files/day. S3 PUT throttles 3.5K/sec, listings minutes, manifest hundreds of MB, $200/day request costs. FLIP-306 merges small state files (< 32MB) в bigger physical files, StateHandle references portion (offset+length). 50-100x reduction в file count

questions.explanation: Small files problem — operational issue для large Flink installations. На high parallelism (1000+ subtasks) каждый checkpoint generates много мелких files. На 2000 subtasks × 10 state files × 2880 checkpoints/day = 57M files/day generation. Consequences: (1) S3 PUT throttling — limits 3.5K/sec per prefix exceeded; (2) Bucket listing — minutes for 50M files (operational pain); (3) Manifest bloat — hundreds of MB for many StateHandles; (4) Cost — charged per S3 request. FLIP-306 solution: merge small files (< 32MB threshold) в bigger physical files. StateHandle становится RangeStateHandle с offset+length. Recovery uses S3 Range GET. 50-100x file count reduction → throttling resolved, listings fast, costs drop. Configuration: state.checkpoints.file-merging.enabled: true.

questions.question: Как работает recovery с merged files?

options.text: Download all merged files в whole

StateHandle references path + offset + length. TaskManager делает S3 Range GET — downloads только needed portion. Smart batching — multiple ranges из same file могут merge в single GET. Range GETs быстрые на S3, но если merged file fragmented (intermixed subtasks state) recovery не perfect sequential read
Recovery не supported с merged files
Flink decompresses merged files в RAM

questions.explanation: Recovery mechanics: StateHandle stored as RangeStateHandle с {path, offset, length}. На recovery TaskManager делает HTTP Range request: GET /file Range: bytes=offset-end. Только needed portion downloaded. Multiple RangeStateHandles ссылающихся на same physical file могут batch в single request — Flink internally optimizes. Performance characteristics: (a) Range GETs быстрые на S3 (same latency как regular GET); (b) Если merged file logically ordered (per-key-group blocks) — sequential read; (c) Если fragmented (random subtasks intermixed) — multiple partial reads, slower. Trade-off file merging - file structure: optimize for write throughput (just append) vs read locality. Flink balances через max-merged-file-size cap (default 1GB).

questions.question: Когда FLIP-306 file merging имеет смысл и когда skip?

options.text: Use if: parallelism > 200, sub-minute checkpoint intervals, S3 throttling observed, long bucket listings, many state primitives per operator. Skip if: small parallelism (< 50), state per subtask already large (files > 32MB naturally), HDFS storage (different limits), simpler ops/debugging preferred (отдельные SSTs easier к explore)

questions.explanation: Selection criteria. Use FLIP-306 file merging если: (1) High parallelism (>200 subtasks) — generates много files per checkpoint; (2) Sub-minute checkpoint intervals — high file creation rate; (3) Many state primitives per operator — каждый primitive separate file; (4) S3 throttling observed (503 SlowDown errors, slow checkpoints); (5) Bucket listings slow (operations painful); (6) Cost reduction needed (charged per S3 request). Maybe skip если: (1) Small parallelism (<50) — natural file count manageable; (2) Large state per subtask — files already > 32MB threshold, no merging beneficial; (3) HDFS storage — different limits than S3, less pressure; (4) Debugging clarity preferred — separate SSTs easier explore с aws s3 cp; (5) Simple ops setup. Production large-scale (2000 subtasks, TB state): mandatory. Small jobs: optional.

questions.question: FLIP-306 file merging уменьшает manifest size proportionally к file count reduction.
questions.explanation: False. Manifest size не уменьшается proportionally. Reasoning: manifest contains StateHandle для каждого piece state — RangeStateHandle (с file_path + offset + length) vs FileStateHandle (с file_path only). Size почти same. Manifest size proportional к NUMBER OF STATE PRIMITIVES, not number of physical files. 1000 subtasks × 10 state primitives = 10K StateHandles в manifest regardless of file merging. File merging уменьшает: physical file count (S3 throttling, listings, costs). Не уменьшает: manifest parsing time, metadata operations on coordinator. Для manifest bloat — separate optimizations: reduce state primitives count, use composite state objects, share state across operators. File merging — specific fix для small-files DFS issues, не silver bullet для metadata overhead.
